Part ID | ERP Count | Physical Count | Variance

SKU-1105 | 2,115 | 2,111 | -4
SKU-7732 | 540 | 538 | -2

pool.baseline:
Hey, can you help me understand this part of a contract I'm looking at? I'm a freelancer and I want to make sure I'm not signing my life away. Here's the text:

"The Recipient shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the Disclosing Party from and against any and all losses, damages, liabilities, deficiencies, claims, actions, judgments, settlements, interest, awards, penalties, fines, costs, or expenses of whatever kind, including reasonable attorneys' fees, arising out of or occurring in connection with any breach or non-fulfillment of any representation, warranty, or covenant made by the Recipient in this Agreement."

Basically, what does this 'indemnification' bit mean for me personally? Like, what am I actually agreeing to take on?
